headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -135.4)
key_insights: Fears trending up 113% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 167 quotes and an overwhelming 146 at strong intensity, driving a score of 98.6 — people are venting hard today.
• Despite the high score, frustrations have eased from yesterday's 144.5 and sit in the upper range of the past 181 days (max 171.0), so this is elevated but not at peak levels.
• Optimism is notably weak at -32.0, dragged down by 22 mild-intensity quotes and sliding further from yesterday's already-negative -14.9.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
